attempts.description: Operator created 'Taylor Grift' agent (likely from the Agents tab or Chat tab) and it didn't appear in the Canvas Conversations palette — the palette only loaded its agents list once at canvas-page construction. Fixed by overriding CanvasPage.showEvent to call palette.reload_agents() every time the operator navigates to the Canvas tab. Cheap (single agents.list RPC); fires only on tab switch. Also shipped a multi-select Skills picker (per the operator's request 'set skills for the agent per model and select them'): new skills.list RPC scans ~/.claude/skills/ for Claude; new SkillsPicker dialog wired to a 'Browse skills…' button on Chat tab + Canvas New-Conversation dialog.
change_overview: apps/gui/canvas/page.py — CanvasPage.showEvent overrides Qt's default to fire palette.reload_agents() on every tab visit
apps/service/main.py — new skills_list RPC scanning ~/.claude/skills/*.md; description picked from front-matter description: or first non-empty body line
apps/gui/widgets/skills_picker.py — SkillsPicker QDialog with multi-select list + pre-checked from current /tokens; selected_tokens() returns /name1 /name2
apps/gui/windows/chat.py — Browse skills… button next to Skills field; _open_skills_picker splices picked tokens with any free-form text
apps/gui/canvas/palette.py — Browse… button on the New-Conversation dialog Skills row; same splice behaviour
apps/gui/ipc/client.py — _friendlier wraps RpcClient errors so 'unknown method: X' surfaces a 'run scripts/restart.cmd' hint instead of cryptic raw text
attempts.risk_note: showEvent override calls super first; reload is idempotent and async (won't block tab switch). SkillsPicker is a brand-new file used only by the new buttons. The friendlier-error wrapper only modifies error messages — no behaviour change for success paths.
next_steps: Run scripts/restart.cmd so the service picks up the new skills.list RPC registration
Click any other tab then return to Canvas — the palette should refresh; create an agent in the Agents tab and watch it appear in the canvas Conversations list on next canvas visit
attempts.annotation_excerpt: I've created agent Taylor Grift, but it's not
